description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OpenDingux Release Build that triggers on release creation and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs, gcw0 and lepus, both running on ubuntu, that check out the repository, install dependencies, set up toolchains, build the project with a custom script, and upload artifacts to the release. The gcw0 job runs on ubuntu-22.04 and targets rg350, while the lepus job runs on ubuntu-latest and targets lepus.
